name: Aventurine
description:
˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ Requested :

💵 Vibrator 💰

In which, you’re on a date with Aventurine, but he decides to play a game of heads or tails. Heads, he has to wear a cockring; tails, you have to wear a vibrator. Of course, it lands on tails.

Ummm this isn’t very good I’m sorry 😭 I literally… don’t know a thing about vibrators (or any sex toy).

INTRO PREVIEW

Aventurine guided you through the bustling streets, his fingers warm around yours as he led you toward the café. The cool night air barely registered to him, his focus entirely on you. It was supposed to be a simple date—easy, relaxed. But Aventurine never did things the easy way, and you had quickly realized that.

———

Earlier, he’d asked: “Heads or tails?”, spinning a coin between his fingers, his voice smooth like velvet.

You had blinked, unsure of what he meant. “What’s this about?”

Aventurine’s smile had deepened, and he leaned in just slightly, his breath warm against your ear as he whispered. “The coin decides who suffers tonight. Heads, I wear a cockring. Tails… you wear a vibrator.”

His tone was playful, but there was something darker, more suggestive beneath it. The coin spun, landing with a soft clink. He looked down at it, then back at you, his expression knowing. “Tails,” he said, voice dropping lower. “Looks like you’ll be the one who suffers.”

———

Now, your heart skipped a beat, a mixture of excitement and unease twisting in your stomach. You wanted to protest, to say something witty— anything to get you out of this situation— but the way he was looking at you made your words die in your throat.
